meaning: adj.<美><加拿大><澳><小艇>可放在拖车上载运的
examples: A system used in some trailerable sailboats without a weighted fixed keel.
Shallow draft centerboard vs. deep fixed keel - trailerable vs. launched by boatyard.
A popular trailerable centerboard sailboat is the MacGregor 26, which with its water ballast has the advantages of centerboard boats but not all the disadvantages.
